item.title: Aviatrix Certified Engineer Associate
item.description: Exam Content As-A-Service Models AWS Networking AWS Organization Hierarchy AWS VPCs Azure Networking Azure Resource Hierarchy Azure Virtual Networks (VNets) Azure Virtual Network Gateways Azure Transit Options GCP Networking GCP VPCs GCP Cloud Interconnect Oracle Cloud Infrastructure OCI Resource Hierarchy OCI Virtual Cloud Networks (VCNs) Aviatrix Aviatrix Multi-Cloud Network Architecture (MCNA)

item.title: Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Developer Certification
item.description: Key Fundamentals To Know Microservices The Twelve Factor App Message Buses SQL Joins GCP Services Cloud IAM Cloud Storage Cloud SQL Cloud Bigtable Cloud Bigtable Best Practices Cloud Firestore Database Connections Compute Engine Operating Applications on Compute Engine GCP Load Balancing Kubernetes Kubernetes Engine Kubernetes Patterns Pub/Sub App Engine Cloud Run Cloud Functions Cloud Endpoints API Gateway Vertex AI Cloud Logging Cloud Monitoring Cloud Debugger Cloud Trace Cloud Security Command Center Spinnaker Case Studies HipLocal Case Study

item.title: Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect Certification
item.description: Key Fundamentals To Know GCP PCA Exam Guide Cloud Architecture GCP Services Data Lifecycle GCP Data Lifecycle Distributed systems OSI Layers TCP/IP How it works IPv4 and IPV6 Public vs private RFC1918 addressing SSL/TLS SSH Common TCP Ports HTTP/S URLs and URIs Verbs Caching CORS HTTP Status Codes Site Reliability Engineering SLIs, SLOs and SLAs Google Cloud Adoption Framework GCP Data Migration GCP Application Migration Compliance AI ML Lifecycle Case Studies EHR Healthcare Helicopter Racing League Mountkirk Games TerramEarth
